title: Dynamic Transmission Conditions for Linear Hyperbolic Systems on Networks
author_string: Marjeta Kramar Fijavž, Delio Mugnolo, Serge Nicaise
abstract: We study evolution equations on networks that can be modeled by means of hyperbolic systems. We extend our previous findings in \cite{KraMugNic20} by discussing well-posedness under rather general transmission conditions that might be either of stationary or dynamic type - or a combination of both. Our results rely upon semigroup theory and elementary linear algebra. We also discuss qualitative properties of solutions.
